code: import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:'/api'});API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('ih_token');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});API.interceptors.response.use(res=>res,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('ih_token');localStorage.removeItem('ih_user');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(err);});export const authAPI={register:data=>API.post('/auth/register',data),login:data=>API.post('/auth/login',data),verifyOTP:data=>API.post('/auth/verify-otp',data),resendOTP:data=>API.post('/auth/resend-otp',data),getMe:()=>API.get('/auth/me'),updateProfile:data=>API.put('/auth/profile',data),changePassword:data=>API.put('/auth/change-password',data)};export const invoiceAPI={getAll:params=>API.get('/invoices',{params}),getOne:id=>API.get("/invoices/".concat(id)),create:data=>API.post('/invoices',data),update:(id,data)=>API.put("/invoices/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>API.delete("/invoices/".concat(id)),updateStatus:(id,data)=>API.patch("/invoices/".concat(id,"/status"),data),downloadPDF:id=>API.get("/invoices/".concat(id,"/pdf"),{responseType:'blob'}),sendEmail:(id,data)=>API.post("/invoices/".concat(id,"/send-email"),data),exportCSV:params=>API.get('/invoices/export/csv',{params,responseType:'blob'})};export const clientAPI={getAll:params=>API.get('/clients',{params}),getOne:id=>API.get("/clients/".concat(id)),create:data=>API.post('/clients',data),update:(id,data)=>API.put("/clients/".concat(id),data),delete:id=>API.delete("/clients/".concat(id))};export const dashboardAPI={getStats:()=>API.get('/dashboard/stats'),getRecent:()=>API.get('/dashboard/recent')};export default API;
